metadata.name: Crafting Shenanigans
metadata.description:
This mod requires REPENTOGON. Press the tilde key to open the new debug console and menu. There's a new Shenanigans option that will let you calculate the output for the bag of crafting (Tainted Cain's starting item).
Note: order doesn't matter.
If you start a new run or pick up an item like sacred orb, toggle the controls to make sure the current run's seed and items are being taken into account.
More info: https://bindingofisaacrebirth.wiki.gg/wiki/Bag_of_Crafting
